title: Department Manager Vacancy at Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited:
Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited!
